title: Savings, beliefs and demographic change
body: "This report examines the relationship between electricity use and the stated environmental beliefs of the household, and the characteristics of high- and low- use households. It assesses the electricity use by pensioners, and estimates the likely change in residential electricity demand as demographics change. Finally, it considers the cost-benefits of a rebate scheme for inefficient appliances. "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
